name: decoy-font-decoder
description: Run a decoder for decoy-font images, show the revealed output image, and state both the hidden and the decoy text in chat.

interface.shortDescription: Reveal the hidden text behind a decoy-font image
interface.longDescription: Run the Python decoder on decoy-font images — glyphs that show one sharp outline letter to machines while a blurred second letter hides behind it for humans. The plugin separates the two spatial-frequency layers with a low-pass filter, renders the revealed hidden message and the decoy layer, and states both texts in chat.
defaultPrompt: Run the decoder, show the revealed image, and state the real hidden text in this image.
This image reads as gibberish — decode the decoy font and show both the hidden and fake text.
